microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery validation program from a 2-person operation into a **platformized system**, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led 0→1 development of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and **self-service scheduling capabilities** that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a scalable, repeatable model.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous-validation standard.
Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**.
Built an internal AI agent and restructured planning workflows to reduce cycle time by **39%** and increase drill capacity by 21%, scaling team leverage without added headcount.
microsoft_2023: Championed adoption of **AI-driven code generation** workflows, running customer-style demos and training sessions that drove utilization across 14 key teams and saved 37 engineering hours monthly.

Influenced the product roadmap to include intent-based YAML generation by facilitating **11+ user interviews** with Azure service teams to surface critical feature gaps and translate them into prioritized requirements.

Improved data integrity and retrieval by migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool with rigorous metadata standards, cutting lookup time by 83% across internal engineering teams.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework across 140+ teams.
Conducted discovery with 20+ service teams to identify **81 hours of manual toil** per region launch, then built a roadmap to automate critical paths and eliminate recurring operational bottlenecks.
Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** to track operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to target automation gaps and prioritize high-impact investments with data-driven precision.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy and mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations ahead of cutover.
Facilitated Agile sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilize the developer intake process within a single quarter.
Drove alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement automated **CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing manual release overhead.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by managing the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals through an optimized CRM process that cut turnaround time significantly.
Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website and Google Business profile for lead quality.
Improved leadership pricing models by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records to identify and seal margin leaks across high-volume service lines.
